MV EVRIKA / 47183 DWT / COLOMBO, SRI LANKA / SPOT
DEAR CHARTERING DESK / MARCONS
GOOD DAY, HOPE ALL FINE AND WELL
PLSD TO HEAR FOR FIRM AND RATED BIZ FOR THE BELOW CANDIDATE
MV EVRIKA - BULK CARRIER
-- OPEN COLOMBO SPOT
-- TRY ANY
BLT: 1997 BY OSHIMA OSHIMA
FLAG: PANAMA
47183 DWT/11,777 M
LOA/BEAM: 185.73/30.95 M
TPC: 50.72MT
HO/HA: 6/6
GRAIN/BALE: 58,999/57,851 CBM
2 CRANES X 35 MTS
SPEED/CONSUMPTION :
ABOUT 11.7K BSS GOOD WEATHER CONDITION ON ABOUT 17.2MT IFO-380CST + ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO IN BALLAST(OR ABT 19MT LSMGO IN ECA)
ABOUT 11.2K BSS GOOD WEATHER CONDITION ON ABOUT 17.2MT IFO-380CST + ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO IN LADEN(OR ABT 19MT LSMGO IN ECA)
IN PORT IDLE: IFO-380CST 2.5 MT +0.1MT LSMGO (GE&BOILER)
IN PORT WORKING: IFO-380CST 4.5 MT +0.1MT LSMGO (GE&BOILER)
BALLASTING AND DE-BALLASTING AT PORT REQUIRES AN ADDITIONAL 3.0 MT FUEL PER OPERATION.
FOR EACH COMPLETE EXCHANGE OF BALLAST AT SEA AN ADDITIONAL 5.0 MT OF FUEL ARE REQUIRED.
THE WORD " ABOUT " IN SPEED AND CONSUMPTION REFERS TO A DOUBLE ALLOWANCE OF 0.5 KNTS ON SPEED AND 5% ON BUNKER.
IN CASE SHIPS CRANES ARE USED +1.4MT OF DIEASL DAILY.
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
